members.name: isConnected
members.description: True if any device is currently streaming to this operator..

members.name: inputSignalFormat
members.description: If available for the current Library, returns a string for the input signal format. This string can be used to set the 'Signal Format' menu on the Video Device Out TOP.

members.name: timecode
members.description: If the device supports timecode, then returns a Timecode object for the latest received frame. see Timecode Class.

_provenance.fact: scraped from the VideodeviceinTOP Class wiki page
